'''zhapungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ignorantness|ignorantness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-p-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ignorantness|ignorantness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhapungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæpingith|zhæpingith]] || [[word:zhæpingij|zhæpingij]] || [[word:zhæpingish|zhæpingish]] || [[word:zhæpingi|zhæpingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhapupunguth|zhapupunguth]] || [[word:zhapupunguj|zhapupunguj]] || [[word:zhapupungush|zhapupungush]] || [[word:zhapupungu|zhapupungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhapunguth|zhapunguth]] || [[word:zhapunguj|zhapunguj]] || [[word:zhapungush|zhapungush]] || [[word:zhapungu|zhapungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhapufnguth|zhapufnguth]] || [[word:zhapufnguj|zhapufnguj]] || [[word:zhapufngush|zhapufngush]] || [[word:zhapufnguf|zhapufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhapunguthu|zhapunguthu]] || [[word:zhapunguju|zhapunguju]] || [[word:zhapungushu|zhapungushu]] || [[word:zhapunguku|zhapunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhapunguth|zhapunguth]] || [[word:zhapunguj|zhapunguj]] || [[word:zhapungush|zhapungush]] || [[word:zhapungu|zhapungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhapunguthul|zhapunguthul]] || [[word:zhapungujul|zhapungujul]] || [[word:zhapungushul|zhapungushul]] || [[word:zhapungukul|zhapungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhapunguthuthu|zhapunguthuthu]] || [[word:zhapungujuju|zhapungujuju]] || [[word:zhapungushushu|zhapungushushu]] || [[word:zhapunguku|zhapunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhapunguthun|zhapunguthun]] || [[word:zhapungujun|zhapungujun]] || [[word:zhapungushun|zhapungushun]] || [[word:zhapungukun|zhapungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhapunguthuoro|zhapunguthuoro]] || [[word:zhapungujuoro|zhapungujuoro]] || [[word:zhapungushuoro|zhapungushuoro]] || [[word:zhapungukuoro|zhapungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
